items.text: Expandable notification bell + docs update for changelog and notifications
Auto-generated changelog from git commits with What's New dialog
Delayed refetch after task/event creation to surface AI-generated notes
Add missing calendarColors, calendarStartHour, calendarEndHour to updateUserSettings
Persist task recommendations across navigation and page reloads
Use Sonnet for notifications and digests for better personality
Add location-aware geofence notifications
Pre-compute available time and add day labels to prevent calendar hallucinations
Strip absolute dates from recommendation context to prevent AI hallucinations
Format next event duration as human-readable and ignore distant events
Prevent AI from hallucinating location/event context in recommendations
Include category in canvas event upsert conflict update
Color calendar events by category instead of source
Add customizable calendar event colors per source
Prioritize tasks by deadline first across notifications and emails
Make unfiltered personality actually cuss
Enforce personality block over examples in push notification prompt
Enforce exclusive time windows for check-in notifications
Move evening check-in window to 7:00pm local time
Send check-in notifications regardless of activity, adapt content to context
Surface evening check-in skip sub-reason in logs
Move evening idle check-in window to 6:30pm local time
Notify users via push when Canvas iCal token expires (401)
Enhance evening idle check-in logic and criteria for notifications
Add evening idle check-in notification and related logic
Add assertiveness mode to notification preferences and update related logic
Use user timezone for today comparison in idle checkins + pass timezone to Haiku prompts
Auto AI notes for manual tasks/events + fix location permission on every load
Add mark all as read to notification bell
Wire personality prefs into all AI notification calls
Push notification action buttons, snooze, and smarter idle check-ins
Update query to use isNull for openedAt and simplify result length calculation
Overhaul single-task scheduler — fewer refusals, better slot selection
Haiku intelligently decides how long to snooze tasks 🧠⏰
Crisis mode now has confetti AND lasers 🚀🎊⚡
Okay fine, ~2000 particles from EVERY direction 🚀🎊💥
MOAR CONFETTI 🎊🎉🎊
Enhance task completion confetti animation with multi-stage effects and custom color palettes
Implement timezone-aware Canvas calendar synchronization and add user timezone settings UI
Transition from single-plan to multi-plan crisis dashboard with support for abandoning crisis plans
Add configurable AI personality settings for task recommendations
Integrate Leaflet map for visualizing saved locations with interactive markers and radius circles
